strategy: Hit with Ice or Life (+35%); never attack into Death (80% resist).

He Steal Charms any blade and Steal Wards any shield you put on yourself or an ally — so minimize single buffs. Cast Elemental or Spirit Blade and he only steals the first part (Fire, or Life), leaving the rest.
Trap him directly — Feint and traps placed ON him aren't stolen (only charms and wards on you or allies are).
Protect a key blade with Aegis, or set up and hit the same round so there's nothing to steal.
Multi-blade, Feint him, then land one big Ice/Life hit.
cheatNotes: He opens by interrupt-casting Gnomes! on a random wizard — expect the round-1 hit.
Any charm (blade) or ward (shield) you cast on yourself or an ally gets stolen for free — trap him directly or use Aegis instead.
Global damage spells also trigger the steal.
Team buffs like Guidance or Legion Shield only get stolen from the caster; Rebirth triggers it via its absorbs.
Cast Elemental Blade or Spirit Blade and he only steals the first part (Fire or Life), so you keep the rest.
